Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}But... the leader of those ruffians in the film...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11906 0 0}He looked just like my scary uncle! I did not want to think about him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11898 0 0}Still... that is easier said than done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}It looks like I have reached the end of the line...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 1 25 25}But you are right. I must stay strong. I cannot stand to have you disappointed in me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems to have cheered up a bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11901 0 0}Shall we go get some food to help improve our moods?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 1 25 25}Come now, let us go, {f 4 2}-dono! I do not fear my uncle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After getting something to eat with[n]Bebe, I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
